description: MillerKnoll, Inc. researches, designs, manufactures, sells, and distributes interior furnishings worldwide. It operates through North America Contract, International Contract, and Global Retail segments. The company also provides seating products, furniture systems, other freestanding furniture elements, textiles, leather, felt, home furnishings and related services, casegoods, storage products, as well as residential, education, and healthcare furniture solutions. It offers its products under the MillerKnoll, Herman Miller, Knoll, Maharam, Geiger, Design Within Reach, DWR, HAY, NaughtOne, Col
